description:
After successful recovery, write updated ClusterBootstrap to ObjectStorage.

## What to Write

ClusterBootstrap FlatBuffer containing:
- cluster_id
- epoch (new epoch from this recovery)
- logs (current log set with OTP refs)
- coordinators (current coordinator nodes)

## Integration Point

Add to PersistencePhase or create new phase after system transaction succeeds.

## Key Change

Use ClusterBootstrap FlatBuffer format (not ClusterState Erlang binary).
ClusterState module can be removed once this is complete.

## Key Files

- lib/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/persistence_phase.ex
- lib/bedrock/system_keys/cluster_bootstrap.ex
- lib/bedrock/object_storage/cluster_state.ex (to be removed)
title: Recovery writes cluster state to object storage
